summary: Iteration 53 — Phase C refactor (wallet router extraction) verified. All 21 regression tests pass. GET /wallet, GET /subscription/plans, POST /wallet/deposit/create-order, POST /wallet/deposit/confirm, POST /redemption/submit, GET /redemption/my behave identically after being moved to /app/backend/routers/wallet.py. Shared helpers (_credit_user, _upi_valid, _redemption_inr, _can_use_free, get_action_cost) still resolve correctly for adjacent endpoints (jobs/apply, interviews/book, auth/me, admin/transactions/search, admin/redemption-requests/*). Auth (401) and role gates (student→403 on /redemption/*) work. First-time ₹199 deposit still awards 398 credits; mock-mode deposit/confirm credits user and inserts a 'deposit' ledger entry with delta=+398. Redemption submit atomically deducts credits, increments locked_credits, inserts redemption_requests doc, and writes a redemption_locked ledger entry with delta=-500 for a 500-credit request. Admin reject flow refunds credits back to the pro. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Dead-code in /app/backend/routers/wallet.py lines 77-80: variable `credits` is assigned twice (line 77 then unconditionally overwritten on lines 78-80 branch). Behaviour is correct (exact ₹199 → 398 credits, other first-deposit amounts → 1:1) but the double-assignment is confusing and identical logic already ran on line 77. Recommend simplifying to: `credits = FIRST_DEPOSIT_BONUS_CREDITS if (is_first and body.amount_inr == FIRST_DEPOSIT_MIN_INR) else body.amount_inr`. Not a regression — same code existed in server.py before the move.
server.py is 3800+ lines — Phase C continuing extraction (parts 2 & 3) will help. File size guideline (<700 lines) is still violated but refactor is in progress.
seed_data_creation: Test fixture updates profile.phone_verified=true and profile.phone='9999999999' on the seeded redeem.pro@example.com user (required for /redemption/submit's require_phone_verified gate — pre-existing iteration-27 behaviour). Test creates a redemption request then rejects it via admin, so net DB delta is zero (credits refunded back).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 = Phase C part 1 of 3. Wallet router (/app/backend/routers/wallet.py) contains: GET /wallet, GET /subscription/plans, POST /wallet/deposit/create-order, POST /wallet/deposit/confirm, POST /redemption/submit, GET /redemption/my. Admin redemption endpoints (approve/mark-paid/reject) remain in server.py. Shared helpers (_credit_user, _upi_valid, _redemption_inr, _can_use_free) still in server.py and imported into wallet router. Reusable regression test: /app/backend/tests/test_iter53_wallet_router_refactor.py.
